title: Engineering Adventure
description: Create focused modpack with more biomes, structures and mobs.
body:
A create focused modpack with no real goal and more or less about the player doing whatever they wish.

This pack does feature some different mechanics like Mini-Maps or encouraging the player to sleep in a well lit area but doesn't have anything fancy like custom recipes or an end goal.


Some of the featured mods and what they do:

Create (and its addons) enables you to make contraptions, railways or factories.

Farmers Delight (again its addons too) expands on foods, farming, and adds some nice kitchen blocks.

Tectonic Revamps the terrain to make it larger and better.
